ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the movie was released */,
  "introduction" TEXT /* Synopsis or introduction of the movie */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the director of the movie */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Length of the movie in minutes */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language in which the movie was produced */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the movie was produced */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget for the movie production */,
  "revenue" TEXT /* Revenue generated by the movie */,
  "poster_url" TEXT /* URL of the movie poster */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL of the movie trailer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("director_id") REFERENCES directors ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Date of birth of the director */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "writers" (
  "writer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each writer */,
  "writer_name" TEXT /* Name of the writer */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Date of birth of the writer */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the writer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("writer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_writers" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie */,
  "writer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the writer */,
  "writing_credit" TEXT /* Type of writing credit (e.g., screenplay, novel, story) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "writer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actors" (
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actor */,
  "actor_name" TEXT /* Name of the actor */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Date of birth of the actor */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the actor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_actors" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the actor */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role played by the actor in the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "genre_description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_genres" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie */,
  "rating_value" REAL /* Value of the rating */,
  "rating_source" TEXT /* Source of the rating */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the production company */,
  "company_address" TEXT /* Address of the production company */,
  "company_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the production company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_production_companies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the production company */,
  "production_role" TEXT /* Role of the production company (e.g., producer, distributor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, researcher, general user) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie */,
  "rating_value" REAL /* Value of the rating */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "award_year" INTEGER /* Year the award was given */,
  "award_category" TEXT /* Category of the award (e.g., Best Picture, Best Director) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "review_rating" REAL /* Rating given in the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)
column_names: Synopsis or introduction of the movie

Language in which the movie was produced

Role played by the actor in the movie
